vehicle_information.key_type: Mechanical ignition key; remote configuration varies

programming.all_keys_lost: Legacy PATS diagnostic or code-based route depending build

vehicle_information.notes: Early first-generation Ka uses the legacy Ford key family. Remote style varies, so verify the original key before supply.

aftermarket_references: Ford Ka FO21 433 MHz ID60 remote-key family

programming.add_key: Supported by compatible Ford PATS diagnostic tools
programming.all_keys_lost: Supported by compatible Ford PATS tools; security access/wait may apply

vehicle_information.notes: Later first-generation Ka changes to 4D60 while retaining the FO21 blade family.

oem_part_numbers: 71765697 — listed on compatible 3-button SIP22 remote family
aftermarket_references: Fiat 500 / Ford Ka 433 MHz ID46 PCF7946 SIP22 remote family

programming.add_key: Use Fiat-derived immobiliser route, not Ford PATS
programming.all_keys_lost: Supported by compatible Fiat CODE tools; PIN/security data may be required

vehicle_information.notes: This generation shares the Fiat 500 platform. KeyStation lists compatible Ford/Fiat 433 MHz ID46 PCF7946 SIP22 remotes, including OEM reference 71765697 on the 3-button family. Never select the Ford PATS menu solely because the badge is Ford.
